title: Twyne Bug Bounty

audit.reason: The report is incomplete and lacks details on specific vulnerabilities found in the LendingPool contract, impact analysis, and test results. Additionally, the code snippets provided are partial and not fully integrated into a working contract.
audit.improvements: Include a comprehensive list of vulnerabilities found, a detailed impact analysis for each, and the results of the testing methodology. Ensure that the code snippets are complete and demonstrate how they mitigate the identified vulnerabilities in the context of the entire contract.
